description: Letter from Shelomo b. Yehuda Gaʾon (r. 1025–1051) to the head of the Babylonian community in Egypt, Sahlan b. Avraham, thanking him for forwarding a donation of ten dinars destined for the poor in Jerusalem, and justifying his unwillingness to borrow a midrash on the Song of Songs (Midrash Hazita) from the 'Third' and copy bits out for Sahlan, approximately 1048 CE (per Gil). Verso: Address in Arabic. (Information from CUDL)
tags: 11th c, Shelomo b. Yehuda, communal, Sahlan b. Avraham
description_he: מכתב משלמה בן יהודה גאון לסהלן בן אברהם, כ-1048. תודה על העברת תרומת 10 דינר לעניי ירושלים, והסבר מדוע אינו מסכים להשאיל את מדרש חזית.
